form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr2) over 2150m at Bendigo beaten 11 m by Maxbeca (2:38.00) in 0-1 WIN on April 1 at $7.50. At the previous start 5th (Fr5) over 2190m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track, at the bell was 3rd-4.17 beaten 13 m by Kualight (2:42.60) in NR up to 49 on March 24 at $34. Deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running during the latter stages of the run to the finish.
Hung in whilst under pressure inside the final 150m.

form.formComment: Resuming after a layoff of four months. Well beaten at the end of his last preparation at this course and distance when twelfth unwanted in the market behind My Lady Sarah. Maybe later.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resuming after a layoff of four months. Well beaten at the end of his last preparation at this course and distance when twelfth unwanted in the market behind My Lady Sarah. Maybe later.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired from the 500m to be beaten 195m into last placing.
Weakened inside the final 500m to be beaten 81.8m.
Raced three wide throughout before giving ground to be beaten 38m.
Hung in under pressure rounding the final turn and contacted marker pegs.
Inconvenienced in the score when Four Star Saint hung in and broke gait.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 5th (Fr5) over 1690m after showing early pace at Kilmore was 2nd-1.59 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Olly Odd Potts (2:07.80) in NR up to 35 on April 2 at $5.50. Before that 4th (Fr1) over 1650m at Bendigo, beaten 3 m by Fake Cullection (1:59.30) in NR up to 40 on March 25 at $10. Not doing enough.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr5) over 1755m at Echuca beaten 7 m by Kimchi (2:09.90) in NR 38 to 44 on April 5 at $11. Before that, a good run when 3rd (Fr3) over 1690m after showing early speed at this track was 3rd-3.73 at the bell, beaten 2.75 m by Roam (2:02.30) in NR 47 to 50 on March 17 at $11. Major player on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened, shortly after the start when shifting down the track.
Cast near hind plate soon after start.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr2) over 1690m at Kilmore was 5th-6.44 at the bell, beaten 17 m by Janiebquick (2:03.30) in NR 45 to 48 on April 2 at $9. At his previous start 7th (Sr5) over 2190m at this track, beaten 20 m by Kualight (2:42.60) in NR up to 49 on March 24 at $15. Can improve enough to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke after the start.
Raced three wide without cover from the 900m mark.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr1) over 2200m at Ballarat beaten 25 m by Precious Belle (2:43.00) in NR 38 to 42 on April 9 at $26. Before that, 4th (Fr4) over 2240m at Swan Hill was 4th-7.2 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Outback Queenie (2:48.90) in NR 38 to 44 on March 31 at $26. This looks a suitable assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for a clear run during the early stages of the home straight.
Pulled hard middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr6) over 2160m at Echuca beaten 30 m by Mussel Shoals (2:40.00) in NR 45 to 50 on April 5 at $13. At the start before 6th (Fr2) over 2190m at this track beaten 21 m by Elated (2:41.50) in NR up to 55 on March 24 at $8. Capable of more than he has shown recently. Among the leading chances on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running in the home straight on the final occasion.
Galloped shortly after the start.
Shifted out under pressure over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 7th (Fr5) over 2160m after racing wide at Echuca beaten 24 m by Mussel Shoals (2:40.00) in NR 45 to 50 on April 5 at $41. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr7) over 2190m at this track, at the bell was 10th-14.95 beaten 16 m by Kualight (2:42.60) in NR up to 49 on March 24 at $101. Has the task ahead.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made contact with the nearside sulky tyre of Whats Glenda Got near the 900m.
Out of position when start effected.

form.formComment: Last start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 9th (Sr3) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 35 m by Elated (1:58.00) in NR 46 to 51 on April 8 at $15. At his previous start broke in score up and was out of position at the start was well beaten after breaking at Kilmore on March 26. Capable of more than he has shown recently. Solid top-three prospects on best figures.
